banner_matchers.value:
^ftpd - accept the connection from [\d.]+
220-eDVR FTP Server v([\d.]+) \(c\)Copyright WebGate Inc\. \w+-\w+
220-Welcome to (DS\w+)
220 You will be disconnected after 180 seconds of inactivity\.
